items.title: Is McDonald's Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
items.description: McDonald's has notably underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, yet analysts remain moderately bullish on the stock’s prospects.

items.title: Taco Bell Rethinks Drive-Thru Voice AI After Prank Order Requests 18,000 Water Cups
items.description: Taco Bell reassesses AI drive-through system after viral ordering flubs. McDonald's and Wendy's also adjusting AI usage.

items.title: Dividend Income: Lanny's June 2025 Summary
items.description: In June, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $5,403.93. We had a booming 4 dividend increases this month

items.title: The Ice Cream That Beat Costco’s Hot Dog as the Best Money Loser in Business
items.description: Business students learn about the concept of a loss leader: a product a store sells at a loss, to bait shoppers into buying something profitable.  For decades, there was no better example than  Costco’s  $1.50 hot dog-and-soda combo, a deal so legendary that it sells 130 million a year.  It is a towering, soft-serve ice cream cone that typically costs 40 cents—and customers buy about 700 million a year.
